title: agraphis patula
intro: Agraphis patula, also known as Himalayan lavender, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving digestive issues. Agraphis patula can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
